comment: Default-FAIL verification contract for T-003 (medium, acceptance-first). Populated after the quality gate reran tests/loop-consistency.tests.sh/.ps1 (bash 24/24, pwsh 9/9 with named self-healing SKIPs for the missing upstream spec/domain review-precheck.ps1 twins) and the epic-159-pillar-a regression set (4 loop suites + template-validator-parity + crlf-parity + constant-parity + guard-ps1-ascii + validate-repository, all green). Shell stack waives the three compile-oriented checks (lint/typecheck/build). This task's RED evidence is the one-time recorded differential against the pre-fix parent commit 2d8c6a5^ (red-differential.log), not a suite-creation RED/GREEN pair, because the suite's own regression-locking purpose IS the differential (the #143 gate-contradiction fix already lives at HEAD).

checks.waiver_reason: No lint tool configured for this repository's shell/PowerShell test-infrastructure files (stack: shell); bash -n and pwsh parse validity are exercised implicitly by every green run recorded in focused-tests.log.
No static type-check command is configured for shell/PowerShell test-infrastructure files.

The suite drives all four dual-reviewer review loops through the REAL precheck and REAL validate-review-context-set.sh scripts against isolated mktemp fixtures; no separate service-integration surface exists beyond what unit/acceptance already exercise.
No compile/build toolchain for shell/PowerShell test-infrastructure files.
No runnable UI/service; this task adds only test-infrastructure (a regression-locking suite plus additive loop-driver dispatch extensions), fully covered by the focused and regression logs.

No baseline-behavior.md; this is not a formally classified refactor/bugfix task so differential-test-policy.md does not apply verbatim. Left required:false, but the task's own RED-differential procedure (git worktree at 2d8c6a5^, --leg impl-round-2) is recorded as evidence here since it is functionally the closest analog to a baseline diff.
No user-facing UI surface; this task adds only tests/loop-consistency.tests.{sh,ps1} plus additive tests/lib/loop-driver.{sh,ps1} extensions.
ds_profile: none; no design-system/ directory exists in this repository.
